```{r}
library(ggplot2)

nfossils <- c()
nextant <- c()
info <- c()

partial_fossil_percentage <- c()
partial_fossil_info <- c()

data <- data.frame(nfossils, nextant, info, partial_fossil_percentage, partial_fossil_info)

ggplot(data = data, aes(x = nfossils, y = info)) + 
  geom_point(size=5)

ggplot(data = data, aes(x = nfossils/nextant, y = info)) + 
  geom_point(size=5)

ggplot(data=data, aes(x = partial_fossil_percentage, y = partial_fossil_info)) +
  geom_point(size=5)
```
